name: Iress Limited
analysis: IRE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 39% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.2100, stop A$5.7420, target A$6.8400 (1.35:1) — then trail it.
